'''Bryx''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Bryx sector/Legends|Bryx sector]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].

==History==
At some point, it was controlled by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. The planet was [[Battle of Bryx|conquered]] by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] prior to the formation of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], but only after numerous battles in which the planet was expertly defended by local [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Carigan]]. Sheer advantage of numbers alone allowed Imperial victory.

{{Planet-stub}}
